sentences.text: This meant there were always beautiful sights and pleasant smells in the garden.
Little Hans had many friends, but his most loyal friend was big Hugh the Miller.
The rich Miller was so devoted to Hans that he never passed the garden without picking flowers or taking fruits like plums and cherries when they were in season.
The Miller often said that real friends should share everything, and Hans felt proud to have a friend with such noble ideas.
